results.title: Haryana Corporate Premier League launched to revolutionise corporate, grassroots and women’s cricket
results.description: Gurugram : In a landmark moment for the region’s sporting landscape, the Haryana Corporate Premier League (HCPL) was officially unveiled on Saturday.
